checks.command: test -d standard && test -d methodology && test -d registry && test -d templates && test -d schema && test -d tools && echo PASS
test -f CONTEXT.md && test -f README.md && test -f CHANGELOG.md && test -f .gitignore && echo PASS
grep -q '## Out of Scope' CONTEXT.md && echo PASS
test -f standard/README.md && test -f methodology/README.md && test -f registry/README.md && test -f templates/README.md && test -f schema/README.md && test -f tools/README.md && echo PASS
test -f CONTEXT.md && test -f README.md && ! grep -riq 'nizamiq' CONTEXT.md README.md && echo PASS

adversarial_check.description: Beyond the 6 listed commands: (1) verified each of the six module directories contains ONLY README.md (no premature module content from features 001-006); (2) confirmed 10 explicit non-goal files/paths are absent (bootstrap.sh, NIZAM.json, standard/NDS.md, standard/GIP.md, standard/AGF.md, standard/anti_hallucination.md, schema/frontmatter.schema.json, tools/skill.json, tools/SKILL.md, registry/nizam-index.schema.json); (3) ran a repo-wide case-insensitive 'nizamiq' grep across all tracked+untracked files (not just CONTEXT.md/README.md as the contract's narrow check requires) and found zero matches; (4) verified all six module README stubs begin with '---' frontmatter containing all 6 required keys (id/title/description/version/status/authoritative_source); (5) confirmed CHANGELOG.md contains exactly one '## [' section header ('Unreleased') with no premature v0.1.0 entry.
adversarial_check.evidence: manual bash session output captured above; no dedicated file written since these were exploratory listing/grep commands, not contract-listed verification commands
